title: Customers With High Total Spending
description: Find customers whose total spending exceeds 400 and who have placed more than one order. Return the customer id along with total spending.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING SUM(amount) > 400 AND COUNT(*) > 1;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    orders.groupBy("customer_id")
    .agg(
        sum("amount").alias("total"),
        count(lit(1)).alias("order_count")
    )
    .filter((col("total") > 400) & (col("order_count") > 1))
    .select("customer_id", "total")
)
